node.content-desc: 交易广场巴士总站(公交站)

node.text: <font size="32"><font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>交易</font>广场巴士总站(公交站)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Exchange Square Bus Terminal (Bus Station)</font>
